Built for TMCs

Built for how TMCs actually operate.

Cinturon360 is a TMC-first platform that replaces legacy back-office complexity with modern automation, governance, and visibility — without disrupting your existing booking channels or supplier relationships.

Replaces Tramada. Works alongside GDS, NDC, and direct suppliers. No rip-and-replace.

Book a Conversation Join Waitlist
The problem

What a TMC's day looks like without Cinturon360

Legacy tools were built for a different era. The gap between what TMCs need and what their software delivers has never been wider.

Manual client onboarding

Every new client means another bespoke spreadsheet, manual setup, and phone calls. No repeatable process. No scalable playbook.

Approvals stuck in email

Travel gets booked before anyone approves it. Finance only finds out at invoice time. There's no system of record for who approved what.

Reporting built in Excel

Someone spends two days each month compiling a spend report that's already out of date by the time it reaches the client.

Policy enforcement is theoretical

The policy document exists. Nobody follows it consistently. There's no way to prove compliance to a client or regulator.

Integration is a project, not a feature

Connecting a new GDS, NDC feed, or supplier requires custom development. Every client configuration is different and fragile.

Scaling means hiring, not automating

As client volume grows, headcount grows with it. There's no platform leverage — just more people doing the same manual work.

Platform capabilities

What TMCs get with Cinturon360

Not a point solution for one problem. A platform that handles the operations layer so your team can focus on clients, not administration.

⚙️

Automated client onboarding

Repeatable, configurable onboarding workflows for every new corporate client. Policy rules, approval chains, cost centre mapping, and reporting templates — set up once, deployed consistently.

Learn more
🛡️

Policy and approval engine

Define rules by entity, traveller, cost centre, destination, supplier, fare cap, or exception type. Route to the right approvers before spend is committed. Full audit trail, always.

Learn more
🔗

Integration layer — no rip-and-replace

Cinturon360 connects to GDS (Amadeus, Sabre, Travelport), NDC feeds (Duffel, AirGateway), and direct suppliers. Your booking channels stay exactly where they are.

Learn more
📊

Finance-grade reporting

Real-time spend visibility by client, cost centre, segment, and traveller. Compliance reporting ready for client review, internal audit, or board presentation.

Learn more
🔄

Mid-office workflow automation

Booking intake, quality control, exception handling, and client notifications — all automated. Replace manual mid-office tasks with configurable workflow logic.

Learn more
📈

Scale without headcount

Take on more clients without proportionally growing your ops team. Platform leverage means the work done for one client configuration lifts every client that follows.

Learn more
Tramada alternative

A modern replacement for legacy mid-office

Tramada has served the industry well. But it was built for a different era — before NDC, before cloud-native platforms, before the modern compliance bar. Cinturon360 is what comes next.

Legacy mid-office (Tramada)

  • On-premise or dated cloud infrastructure
  • Manual configuration for each client
  • Limited NDC and modern supplier connectivity
  • Reporting requires custom exports and Excel
  • Expensive to customise, slow to update
  • Approval workflows bolted on or absent

Cinturon360

  • Cloud-native, APAC-hosted, globally scalable
  • Repeatable client onboarding via configuration
  • Native GDS, NDC, and direct supplier connectivity
  • Real-time reporting, no exports required
  • API-first, continuously updated
  • Approval workflows built into the core data model

Migration support and parallel-run capability available for TMCs transitioning from Tramada.

Integrations

Works with the ecosystem you already use

No forced migrations. Cinturon360 connects to your existing GDS, NDC, and supplier relationships — adding governance and visibility on top of what's already working.

View full integrations documentation

Pricing built around your operation

No two TMCs operate the same way. Cinturon360 pricing is a custom model built around your client volume, workflow complexity, and commercial requirements. There's no off-the-shelf tier that fits a TMC operation — so we don't pretend there is.

How pricing works →

Join the waitlist or book a conversation with the team. We're working with early design partners now — TMCs that want to shape the platform.
